title: Day 34 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:  

Sentence 1 - こんばん　なに　たべる？ = What shall we eat tonight?

Sentence 2 - それ　ひるに　たべた。= I ate that for lunch.

Sentence 3 - それ、　おととい　たべなかった？ = Didn't we eat that the day before yesterday?

Sentence 4 - きょうは　なにも　つくらないから　たべに　いかない？ = I will not cook tonight so do you want to eat out?

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
